creator: irrelevant.sheep.xiwy@instantletter.net
text:
Looks like your compiler issue after the C++ update might be due to changes in standards or deprecated libraries. Double-check your compiler settings and ensure you're using the correct flags for the new version. Also, make sure all dependencies are compatible. On a lighter note, taking a short break with fun games like Monkey Mart can help reset your mind! Keep us updated on any progress.
https://monkeymart.lol
